'''âf-g-l''' ('''fagala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whois|whois]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whois|whois]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-g-l
|-
! Lemma
| fagala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fagalithi|fagalithi]] || [[word:fagaliji|fagaliji]] || [[word:fagalishi|fagalishi]] || [[word:fagali|fagali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagaluthuth|fagaluthuth]] || [[word:fagalujuj|fagalujuj]] || [[word:fagalushush|fagalushush]] || [[word:fagal|fagal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagaluthu|fagaluthu]] || [[word:fagaluju|fagaluju]] || [[word:fagalushu|fagalushu]] || [[word:fagalu|fagalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagalufuth|fagalufuth]] || [[word:fagalufuj|fagalufuj]] || [[word:fagalufush|fagalufush]] || [[word:fagaluf|fagaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fagalethe|fagalethe]] || [[word:fagaleje|fagaleje]] || [[word:fagaleshe|fagaleshe]] || [[word:fagale|fagale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagalothoth|fagalothoth]] || [[word:fagalojoj|fagalojoj]] || [[word:fagaloshosh|fagaloshosh]] || [[word:fagal|fagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagalotho|fagalotho]] || [[word:fagalojo|fagalojo]] || [[word:fagalosho|fagalosho]] || [[word:fagalo|fagalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagalofoth|fagalofoth]] || [[word:fagalofoj|fagalofoj]] || [[word:fagalofosh|fagalofosh]] || [[word:fagalof|fagalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fagalĂŠthĂŠ|fagalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fagalĂŠjĂŠ|fagalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fagalĂŠshĂŠ|fagalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fagalĂŠ|fagalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagalathath|fagalathath]] || [[word:fagalajaj|fagalajaj]] || [[word:fagalashash|fagalashash]] || [[word:fagal|fagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagalatha|fagalatha]] || [[word:fagalaja|fagalaja]] || [[word:fagalasha|fagalasha]] || [[word:fagala|fagala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagalafath|fagalafath]] || [[word:fagalafaj|fagalafaj]] || [[word:fagalafash|fagalafash]] || [[word:fagalaf|fagalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fagalasha|fagalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofagalasha|gofagalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifagalasha|gokifagalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fagalnĂŒsha|fagalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofagalnknĂŒsha|gofagalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifagalnĂŒsha|gokifagalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fagalshĂ«sha|fagalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofagalnkshĂ«sha|gofagalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifagalshĂ«sha|gokifagalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagalrosha|fagalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagalnkrosha|gofagalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagalrosha|gokifagalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fagalmusha|fagalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagalnkmusha|gofagalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagalmusha|gokifagalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fagalsherasha|fagalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofagalnksherasha|gofagalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifagalsherasha|gokifagalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fagalngasha|fagalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofagalnkngasha|gofagalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifagalngasha|gokifagalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fagalyasha|fagalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofagalnkyasha|gofagalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifagalyasha|gokifagalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fagalyamasha|fagalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofagalnkyamasha|gofagalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifagalyamasha|gokifagalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fagalnĂŒshĂ«sha|fagalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofagalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofagalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifagalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifagalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagalnĂŒrosha|fagalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagalnknĂŒrosha|gofagalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagalnĂŒrosha|gokifagalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fagalnĂŒmusha|fagalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagalnknĂŒmusha|gofagalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagalnĂŒmusha|gokifagalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fagalshĂ«nĂŒsha|fagalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofagalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofagalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifagalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifagalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagalshĂ«rosha|fagalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagalnkshĂ«rosha|gofagalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagalshĂ«rosha|gokifagalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fagalshĂ«musha|fagalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagalnkshĂ«musha|gofagalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagalshĂ«musha|gokifagalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fagalronĂŒsha|fagalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofagalnkronĂŒsha|gofagalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifagalronĂŒsha|gokifagalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fagalroshĂ«sha|fagalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofagalnkroshĂ«sha|gofagalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifagalroshĂ«sha|gokifagalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fagalromusha|fagalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagalnkromusha|gofagalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagalromusha|gokifagalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fagalmunĂŒsha|fagalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofagalnkmunĂŒsha|gofagalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifagalmunĂŒsha|gokifagalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fagalmushĂ«sha|fagalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofagalnkmushĂ«sha|gofagalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifagalmushĂ«sha|gokifagalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagalmurosha|fagalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagalnkmurosha|gofagalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagalmurosha|gokifagalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fagal|fagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠgĂŠl|fĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofagal|hofagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠgĂŠl|hofĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofagal|hohofagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠgĂŠl|hohofĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfagal|nĂŒfagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠgĂŠl|nĂŒfĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfagal|nĂŒnĂŒfagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠgĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfagal|nĂŻfagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠgĂŠl|nĂŻfĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfagal|nĂŻnĂŻfagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠgĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufagal|lufagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠgĂŠl|lufĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufagal|lulufagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠgĂŠl|lulufĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifagal|lifagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠgĂŠl|lifĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifagal|lilifagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠgĂŠl|lilifĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofagal|kofagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠgĂŠl|kofĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofagal|kokofagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠgĂŠl|kokofĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefagal|kefagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠgĂŠl|kefĂŠgĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefagal|kekefagal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠgĂŠl|kekefĂŠgĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
